---
title: "Evolution in DDD use of Diabetes Drugs over time"
author: "Henrik Vitus Bering Laursen"
date: "2024-08-20" 
categories: [news, code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
---

## Purpose

I have studied the use of of antidiabetic drugs, or their utilisation, in Denmark, as part of my Ph.D.

My sources were registry data taken directly from Lægemiddelstyrelsens Medicin DataBase (LMDB), which requires special access not given to just anyone.

Now I would like to see what I can do with publicly available data.
